textDisplay:
They used to make movies like this that were for the whole family.
It doesn't need to be rated g but it's nice to say something uplifting for a change.
❤wish I could take ALL 3 of my daughters and their daughters so we could ALL see it together!!!❤
She's my crush too!!! I LUV her. Very much under appreciated!!! (Like a lot of us are!! ) God Bless❤

It only shows the blessings that can come from true Faith and Resilience in this Life! Angels protect and are amongst us every day! Beautiful story! Keep the Faith! Faith transforms us!
Hillary and cast did an outstanding! performance!
Can not wait to watch this movie
Being under one God and In God We Trust are our highest ideals. But we must all gain this trust individually. What does it mean to you? To others?
She dies in the movie. Sad
Looks so good
This kind of movie they be making more of  then the trash they put out
Wow.. got a feeling she’ll win an award for this.
Gonna go with my daughter,I can't wait!!

I just watched expecting nothing out of it just enjoy the movie. But wow!!! Movie is SO BEAUTIFUL!!! Full of hope, oh my God I just enjoy every single minute it's AMAZING!!! ❤❤❤ we need more movies like this. Thank you for sharing this incredible story!!!!

This looks like such a wonderful movie. Glad it will finally be out next week where we live. These are the movies this world needs to see not all these evil movies they keep putting out. This I will go to see in the theater.
Can’t wait
I freaking LOVE HILARY❤❤❤
My girlfriend shared this trailer and I wasn’t able to finish half way through. This is a great movie. God bless the true people behind this

This true story happened 30 years ago in our community and church where I live in Louisville, KY!! 😇 We had the amazing opportunity of seeing a special screening!!  wow, incredible film, 🙏🏻 for God to move in miraculous ways!!! 🥹❤️🥲
How about we not spoil the whole movie in the trailer
Tonight it’s going to be played at Harvest church in Riverside ca @ 5:00 pm
AKA Erin Brockovich helps a girl get a liver transplant
TAMALA JONES = 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
I can not wait to sow this to the people in my theater!  I am excited
I dont know I'm just a retard
Laugh until your heads come off
Too be honest they should of put radio head in this kid A something about first the children idk the fucken name anymore fuck me
This is a dad daughter film for sure ill be watching it with my lil girl
Ive seen this movie trailer in theaters at least 4 times and everytime me and my dad cry
Alan Ritchson better win an oscar for this
See it Feb 24 with my papa
One of my favorite movie's to have worked on, and Alan Ritchson was super cool off set!
I love Alan as an action fighting hero, but I can't wait to see this one totally different role for him than I'm used to but it looks fantastic
When does it come out in theaters

I have a early prediction, this will be the movie that gives Hillary Swanks her third academy award. She is so underappreciated, and often over looked, most say meryl streep is the GOAT, I respectfully desagree, Hilary Swank has won two Oscars in very different, and very difficult rolls. I'm a fan of her range, how with each roll she never has any cross over.  She has a smile if it's directed at you it has such kindness behind it, Clint Eastwood said she is one of the kindness, true to form actresses he ever worked with, that's huge. She is my adult crush, she is just awesome.
These are the movies we need. Stories of hope and goodness in the world. Inspiration of love, kindness, and service
Im crying already!
I'd love to see this movie!!
If we have money for mansions and statues in our country, we have the means to make sure the parent(s) of a sick child can worry solely about that child. Can we all agree on that??
Made me tear up a little bit.
Can't wait
Brilliant!
